title: Dreaming of Deja Vu
description: Psychologically, the sensation of deja vu in dreams may indicate that the subconscious is processing a previously lived memory or connecting with an unresolved emotional state.

meanings.title: Main Interpretation
meanings.description: According to Freud, experiencing deja vu in dreams may signal repressed memories or desires trying to surface. For Jung, it might be an ancient archetype or symbol manifesting through the collective unconscious.

meanings.title: Subconscious Warning
meanings.description: The subconscious might be urging to address an unresolved issue or trauma from the past.

meanings.title: Life Context
meanings.description: In daily life, such dreams may occur more frequently during periods of recurring stress or anxiety, suggesting awareness of cyclical events in your life.

interpretation: This dream may indicate that you find yourself in the midst of an emotional connection from the past or an unresolved issue. It could signify that it's time to confront your history and your inner self.

context.positive: The sense of deja vu could provide personal insight and self-awareness.
context.negative: This feeling might represent unease brought on by repeatedly unresolved issues or emotions.
